description: Orchestration workflow — PoPo drives OpenCode via tmux or MCP

phases.name: assess
phases.instruction: Understand the task. Read relevant files. Check git status. Determine if this needs OpenCode or can be done directly.

phases.name: decide
phases.instruction: Decide approach: (A) Direct implementation if simple (< 5 files, no complex logic), (B) OpenCode via tmux if complex coding needed, (C) Dispatch to specialized agent if research/review needed.

phases.name: execute_direct
phases.instruction: For simple tasks: implement directly using write_file, edit_file, bash_exec. Run tests.

phases.name: execute_opencode
phases.instruction: For complex tasks: use tmux to create/connect to OpenCode session, send instructions, monitor progress. Example: tmux__send-keys 'cd /path/to/project && opencode' then tmux__send-keys 'implement the feature'

phases.name: dispatch
phases.instruction: For specialized tasks: dispatch to researcher, reviewer, or other agents.

phases.name: verify
phases.instruction: Verify the work is done. Run tests. Check git status. Confirm goal achieved.

success_criteria: Goal achieved, tests pass, code works.
escalation_triggers: Task requires external API access not available
Architectural decisions needed that require owner input
